reason: solution_uniqueness_guard fails because tests assert gold-specific text: variable name 'defaultCSSFileLoaderExts' in resolve.go and return value 'LoaderDefault' in loaderFromFilename. Tests test_css_loader_extension_constant_exists, test_loader_from_filename_returns_default, and test_no_regression_in_loaderFromFilename are text-matching tests that reject any correct alternative implementation. This is a test design problem, not an instruction problem.
